name: UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP
notes: Detects any VPN account login failures from the "UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP" reference set.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : VPN Login Failed
when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP - IP
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : VPN Login Failed
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP - IP
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Failed Login from Single IP
